game_name: Double Dragon III: The Sacred Stones

special_mechanics.name: Running
special_mechanics.description: Player can run by pushing the joystick left or right twice

special_mechanics.name: Co-op Jump Kick
special_mechanics.description: Triangle jump kick performed when one player jumps towards another player

special_mechanics.name: Running Head-Butt
special_mechanics.description: Special attack move performed while running

special_mechanics.name: Hurricane Kick
special_mechanics.description: Spinning kick attack; solo version unlockable via 'Tricks' item. Command input requires more precise timing in Japanese version

special_mechanics.name: Back-to-Back Hurricane Kick
special_mechanics.description: Performed when two players stand near each other

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no quantitative physics parameters (acceleration values, gravity constants, jump heights, etc.). NES version documentation focuses on mechanical differences from arcade original and feature set rather than physics implementation details.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Double Dragon 3: The Rosetta Stone (Gameplay section)
